name: Chicken Chili Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Kidney beans, cooked or canned
1 lb Grilled chicken breast, boneless, skinless
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss kidney beans with scallions, roasted red pepper, and grilled chicken breast.
2. Mix mayonnaise with chili powder, cumin, buttermilk, hot pepper sauce, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Toss the dressing mixture with the bean salad, along with chopped parsley.
4. Serves 4.
